column1: Hey Nico, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
i'm getting ready to book through expedia right now but i'll see what you got
Cool I got you bro. what pricing you lookin at rn on Expedia? and what are they including for you
through expedia it's showing 823$ a perosn for flight and all inclusive
oh wow, which destination, what resort, and which exact dates
punta cana, fly out march 7th fly back march 14th
could you send me a screenshot of it so I can do what we can to match it if possible
bet! lets see what we can do. will try our best. $823 with flights for 7 nights does sound a little wild tho ngl lol
that's for 4 people but jsut double would be

Got you. if you can tho, just to make sure theyre not just tryna lure you in. go all the way through the booking as if youre about to pay. so you can see the true rate with taxes, fees, and whatever else they add
And lets see what that looks like
i mean we are open to other options just need to book by like tmrw! we are fine with punta cana or cancun we just want lots of college kids and partys
yea! thats what we specialize in for sure. I'll personally be in Punta Cana too so would be dope to have y'all there with me as your rep
But yea I just wanna make sure I can get you the best deal possible, so if you dont mind taking a look at that, we'll cook up what we can from there
that's the screen shot as if i was to end my card info and hit complete booking
Got you. one last thing, hate to be a pain but Im gonna have to show my team and theyre gona ask for this
is there a list of whats actually included in what youre paying for?
also what is gonna be best resort to go to in punta cana for college kids and party atmosphere
Bet got it, thank you for sending these. gonna see what I can do! and honestly, the Occidental Caribe isnt bad, but you'll have more fun and a better overall experience at the Occidental Punta Cana
do you see an option for the Occidental Punta Cana there on Expedia?
Hey, Also all of us have a passport that we have had for a year, besides 1 person, if he gets it now will he be ok? i read something about 6. month valid upon arrival for passport
Yea you'll be fine with the passport. the 6 months I think you read is that your passport can't be expiring within 6 months of arrival
and I've dug and dug, its gonna be impossible for me to get you a deal below $820 to occidental caribe with flights included
ok what are you sitting at ?
i mean do we get any perks if we were to go through you ?
bc if you are saying it's impossible for you to get that price, i wanna make sure i ain't gonna get scammed thriugh expedia! but definitely would love to go through you

yea I would love to help! just tough for me to compete with that one, especially for 7 nights. the cheapest I can came across was $939 and that was only a 4 night stay. with flights included from ORD. Occidental Caribe
ok let me talk to the fellas and see real quick man, not always is the cheapest option the best option.
feel you bro. I'll send all of this in an email so you have it
whats the best email to send to
sent that over lmk if it came through
bettt. not as low as expedia but best I could put together
Nico whats good brotha, how we feelin?
hey my. man after talking to them they wanna take the cheaper route! but that doesn't stop us from getting thing form you. are we able to buy excursions or party passes or shuttles etc through you?

whats good bro. grand oasis with flights included?
Cancun grand O is a little cheaper fs
can you send me over some details
we are making are final decisions today and booking today
word. we lookin for the cheapest we can get? that would be a 4 night stay
Aight bro I got a game plan for you, hear me out
If we want to do Cancun and save a lot of $$. I found a flight here that you can grab for $258 which is crazy https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/SwYda5GYGVNKR2Uh8
Right, then our base 4 night package is $566 which I can get down to $516
So if you get the base package through us, and go grab this flight I just sent, you lookin at $774 for an all inclusive 4 night spring break
If that ain't a steal idk what is lol

aight bet. so party pass comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar to nightclubs off the resort. We host at Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca, and we have the open bar booze cruise
we have a 3 event bundle deal running rn for $200. any 3 of those events
